hero.title: To rent a contemporary villa near the historic city center of Sarlat.
hero.subtitle: 3 bedrooms · Heated pool · Up to 9 guests

presentation.title: Villa Bouyssou · 500m from center · Heated pool

exterior.poolDescription: Enjoy a heated pool and approximately 2,386 m² of land, surrounded by lush greenery.
exterior.poolFullText: The villa's amenities include a heated pool and a large garden providing an idyllic setting for outdoor relaxation. The house and the heated pool (heat pump from May to October) face south, allowing you to fully enjoy the sun throughout the day. The pool measures 11x4m. The terrace is equipped with a gas barbecue, a large table, and a set of garden furniture, perfect for relaxing by the water and sharing group meals. For recreation, there is a ping pong table and pool accessories, as well as board games for all ages. For cooler nights, an outdoor heater is at your disposal.
exterior.architectureDescription: A contemporary architecture with spacious living areas, blending modernity and conviviality.
exterior.architectureFullText: Villa Bouyssou is a unique creation, custom-designed by a renowned architect from Sarlat, Gérard Bouyssou. This residence features clean lines, minimalist design, and large multiple volumes aimed at optimizing pleasant living spaces for group gatherings. Facing south, its large windows allow natural light to pour in. With spacious and functional areas, you'll have direct access to the pool and garden from the living room through its large windows. Ideal for keeping an eye on the children at all times.

interior.title: Discover the many amenities offered by the villa.

bedrooms.title: Three Bedrooms with Private Bathroom
bedrooms.general: Each bedroom has its own private bathroom, ensuring comfort and privacy for all guests.

bleuNuit.name: Bleu Nuit
bleuNuit.description: Elegant and soothing ambiance with deep blue tones. King-size bed, garden view.

terracotta.name: Terracotta
terracotta.description: Warm and bright, terracotta hues and natural materials. Queen-size bed, en-suite bathroom.

ocre.name: Ocre
ocre.description: Soft and refined, ochre and golden shades. Two convertible single beds, ideal for children.

locationSection.title: Just a 5-minute walk from the historic city center.
locationSection.description: You are 500 meters away from the city center of Sarlat. You can stroll and do your shopping with ease. This is especially convenient in the summer when Sarlat is very busy and parking can be challenging. You will also find a bakery, a supermarket, a pharmacy, and all other amenities near the house.

welcome.title: A Caring Welcome!
welcome.description: Upon your arrival, Julien will greet you. He will hand over the keys and give you an overview of how the house operates. If you need anything during your stay, he will be available on-site to assist you.

seasonal.title: Celebrate Christmas and New Year in a cozy atmosphere!
seasonal.description: Enjoy warm moments by the fireplace and celebrate the holiday season with your family starting from €395 per night.

events.title: Do you want to host a special event at the Villa?
events.description: For the organization of seminars, weddings, professional projects, or any other special event, feel free to contact me.

marquee.text: Enjoy the unique atmosphere of this villa, designed to offer a memorable and unforgettable stay!

travelGuideTeaser.title: Discover the region, enjoy the best addresses!
travelGuideTeaser.description: Explore the Périgord Noir and its treasures: gastronomy, historic sites, outdoor activities, and hidden gems hand-picked by your hosts.

contact.hostSubtitle: Your host at La Villa Bouyssou

travelGuide.title: Périgord Travel Guide
travelGuide.subtitle: Discover the region, enjoy the best addresses!
travelGuide.description: The Périgord Noir is full of treasures: villages ranked among the most beautiful in France, medieval castles steeped in history, fascinating prehistoric caves, and exceptional gardens. Let us guide you through these wonders to discover from La Villa Bouyssou.
